tweets.topic: 7 out of 10 Indians hit by tech support scams: How to spot and avoid them
tweets.tweet: Tech support scams fooling 7/10 Indians because bhai, when someone calls saying your computer has virus, we panic instead of thinking mere paas toh phone hai. They create urgency, ask for remote access, demand ₹5000 for fixing. Simple rule: Microsoft/Google NEVER calls you. #Tech

tweets.topic: Push payment scams explained: Why you're authorizing your own fraud
tweets.tweet: Waah bhai, push payment scam — fancy naam for when YOU authorize thieves to clean your account! Banks call it customer authorized toh responsibility bhi tumhari. UPI made it so easy ki scammers don't even need your PIN anymore, just your panic. Brilliant system yaar! #UPIScam #Di

tweets.topic: Jio vs Airtel vs Vi: Which telecom plan actually gives best value in 2025
tweets.tweet: Jio's unlimited has FUP limits. Airtel's cheapest plan costs ₹179 but data expires in 24 days not 30. Vi? They're just happy if towers work. Meanwhile TRAI sleeps while telcos play musical chairs with your money. Which value - paying more or getting less? #JioAirtelVi #TelecomSca

tweets.topic: Dark patterns on Amazon & Flipkart: How e-commerce sites trick you into overspending
tweets.tweet: Amazon Flipkart ki maya dekho! Only 2 left dikha kar panic create karte hain, checkout mein surprise charges add karte hain, aur cancel karna rocket science bana dete hain. Tumhara ₹500 item somehow ₹800 ho jata hai. Smart shopping ya psychological warfare? #DarkPatterns #Ecommer
